pages.title: Privacy Policy
pages.content:
## Privacy Policy

Your privacy is important to us. This policy outlines how INCroute collects, uses, and protects your personal information.

### Information We Collect
- Name, email, and phone number provided via forms
- Business details for service delivery
- Usage data for improving our platform

### How We Use Your Information
- To provide requested services
- To communicate updates and deadlines
- To improve our platform experience

### Data Protection
We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data.

pages.title: Terms & Conditions
pages.content:
## Terms & Conditions

By using INCroute's services, you agree to the following terms.

### Service Scope
INCroute provides compliance, registration, and advisory services. We act as facilitators between you and government bodies.

### Refund Policy
Refunds are processed as per our refund policy for services not yet initiated with government authorities.

pages.title: Refund Policy
pages.content:
## Refund Policy

We value your trust. If you are unsatisfied with our services, please contact us within 7 days.

### Eligible for Refund
- Service not yet initiated with any government body
- Duplicate payment

### Not Eligible
- Government fees already paid
- Services already filed with authorities
